privileged_info_summary: The task involves navigating to a synthetic contact named 'Dr. Hameed' whose address is Jalalabad, a real city in eastern Afghanistan (34.4265°N, 70.4515°E). The contact is created programmatically in the setup phase. The expected navigation distance of 120-170 km is consistent with the real driving distance (~150 km) from Kabul to Jalalabad, suggesting the initial device location is set to Kabul, Afghanistan. The environment downloads offline maps for Afghanistan during setup.
